title: Display Source Dashboard per Report in Metrics Analyst Results
story: As a data analyst reviewing Metrics Analyst results, I want to see which dashboard each report belongs to in the results table, so that I can understand the source context of each recommended metric.
description: In the Metrics Analyst results table, add a column showing the parent dashboard for each report. If two dashboards contain the same report, both dashboards should be listed for that report entry.
acceptance_criteria: A dashboard column appears in the results table showing the source dashboard for each report
If a report appears on multiple dashboards, all related dashboards are listed
ux_changes: Added a dashboard column to the Metrics Analyst results table showing which dashboard each report belongs to, with support for multiple dashboards per report.
implementation_notes: The feature was marked as already complete during review.
comment_summary: Developer asked for clarification. Ryan confirmed it was already complete based on the current implementation.
